name: Mocha Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Cream butter until smooth. Add both sugars and beat well. Incorporate the egg, mixing thoroughly. Gradually add flour, instant coffee powder, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, vanilla extract. Stir in half a cup of finely chopped walnuts. Mix until combined. Wrap dough in wax paper and refrigerate for at least two hours.
2. Remove dough from refrigerator. Shape into balls using palms of hands, spacing them about 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake for 12-15 minutes.
3. Remove cookie sheet from oven and quickly place three to four chocolate chips in the center of each hot cookie. When chocolate begins to soften, spread over top and sprinkle with remaining walnuts. Transfer cookies to a wire rack and allow to cool.
